Thibodaux, Louisiana
October 15, 1995
Thibodaux Civic Center

disk 1
   1. Drifter's Escape
   2. Man In The Long Black Coat
   3. All Along The Watchtower
   4. Queen Jane Approximately
   5. Watching The River Flow
   6. Silvio
   7. Mr. Tambourine Man (acoustic)
   8. Masters Of War (acoustic)
   9. Mama You Been On My Mind (acoustic)

disk 2
  10. Maggie's Farm
  11. Disease Of Conceit
  12. Seeing The Real You At Last

      (encore)
  13. West LA Fadeaway
  14. The Times They Are A-Changin' (acoustic)
  15. Rainy Day Women #12 & 35
